reasoning: Finland is currently the clear favorite to win Eurovision 2026, with implied winning odds around 40% (decimal odds 2.4-2.6). Translating a 40% win probability to a Top 3 placement typically yields a probability in the 70-80% range, as runaway favorites generally perform well enough across both televote and jury voting to secure a podium finish, even if they occasionally miss the win. Polymarket odds for this specific market have recently stabilized around 0.74–0.75 on sizable volume, proving a very strong anchor. While some reports note juries might rank the Finnish entry slightly lower, their massive televote appeal makes a Top 3 finish highly likely. I closely align with the direct market price of 0.74, factoring in standard Eurovision contingencies (e.g., highly hyped entries underperforming live, disqualifications), and slowly decrease the probability for the longer artificial horizons as requested.
